name: Ironclad
description: Monitor Ironclad contract lifecycle management platform for document access and legal compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Ironclad at https://ironcladapp.com
2. Go to Company Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new API token with read access
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Ironclad Company Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Ironclad users with access to contract management workflows

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Ironclad contract management platform is operational
